news.title: 美使馆遇袭，中东战火蔓延
特朗普与斯塔默首次通话，修补因伊朗问题受损的关系
news.title0: Starmer and Trump speak for first time since president's Iran criticism
news.content: 美国总统特朗普与英国首相斯塔默首次通话，讨论中东局势与军事合作，试图缓和因英国对伊朗反应引发的紧张关系。
news.content0: Sir Keir Starmer and Donald Trump have spoken for the first time since the US president angrily criticised the UK's Iran response.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 加勒比海深处发现未知海洋生物与原始珊瑚礁
news.title0: Spectacular images reveal unique sea creatures and corals off Caribbean islands
news.content: 科学家在英属加勒比岛屿深海首次探险中，发现水下山脉、巨大“蓝洞”、未受气候变化影响的原始珊瑚礁及多种前所未见的海洋生物。
news.content0: The waters off the glittering coastlines of Britain's Caribbean territories have long been a mystery.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国女主播母亲失踪逾月，案情仍扑朔迷离
news.title0: Unanswered questions as search for Nancy Guthrie enters a new month
news.content: 美国电视主持人萨凡纳·格思里84岁的母亲南希·格思里神秘失踪已超一个月，案件涉及绑架、赎金等，但调查进展甚微，希望渐失。
news.content0: It's been more than a month since the mysterious disappearance of Nancy Guthrie captivated the nation, and yet more questions than answers remain.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国机场因政府停摆现数小时安检长队
news.title0: Thousands face long security queues at Houston and New Orleans airports
news.content: 美国休斯顿和新奥尔良机场因春季出行高峰及政府部分停摆导致安检人员短缺，旅客面临长达数小时的安检等待队伍。
news.content0: Thousands of travellers waited in hours-long queues at US airports on Sunday amid increased spring travel and limited security personnel - who have been working without pay during a partial US government shutdown.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 挪威警方称美驻奥斯陆使馆爆炸或为恐袭
news.title0: Explosion at US embassy in Oslo may have been terrorism, Norway police say
news.content: 挪威警方表示，美国驻奥斯陆大使馆遭到的夜间爆炸袭击可能为恐怖主义行为，使馆建筑轻微受损，无人伤亡。
news.content0: An overnight explosion at the US embassy in Oslo may have been an act of terrorism, Norway's police have said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 新加坡舞者因占用公共通道练习遭投诉
news.title0: Dancers loved practising in this Singapore walkway. Then the complaints came
news.content: 新加坡一处连接地铁站与滨海湾花园的地下通道因舞者长期占用练习遭投诉，管理方将通道镜子磨砂处理，引发关于公共空间使用的讨论。
news.content0: With its wide floors, floor-to-ceiling mirrors and a ready audience, the underground passage connecting a train station to Singapore's iconic Gardens by the Bay had served as a practice ground for aspiring dancers for years.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 格拉斯哥中央车站旁建筑大火致车站关闭
news.title0: Building at Glasgow Central Station collapses in huge inferno
news.content: 苏格兰最繁忙的格拉斯哥中央车站旁一栋建筑发生大火并部分坍塌，车站被迫无限期关闭，数十趟列车服务取消，暂无人员伤亡报告。
news.content0: A huge blaze has engulfed a building at Glasgow Central Station causing it to partially collapse.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 前说唱歌手在尼泊尔大选中获压倒性胜利
news.title0: Gen Z-Backed Rapper Is on Course to Lead Nepal With Landslide Win
news.content: 35岁的前说唱歌手巴伦德拉·沙阿领导的政党在尼泊尔大选中赢得压倒性胜利，标志着Z世代力量推翻政治旧秩序。
news.content0: In a resounding affirmation of Gen Z’s power to overthrow the political old guard, Nepali voters have handed a commanding majority to a party headlined by a 35-year-old ex-rapper.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: 哥伦比亚大选前暴力事件频发，候选人遭绑架
news.title0: Violence on the Campaign Trail Rattles Colombia Ahead of Elections
news.content: 哥伦比亚大选前夕暴力事件激增，原住民领袖兼参议员艾达·奎尔库埃在竞选途中遭武装人员短暂绑架，凸显选举安全风险。
news.content0: Aida Quilcué, an Indigenous leader and a Colombian senator, said she was driving through rural southwest Colombia with her security detail when about a half dozen armed men in camouflage stopped them by a bend in the road.
news.author: NYTimes
